sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106012" key="turo/mantis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῡρό-μαντις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, ὁ</foreign> and <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n106012.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who divines from cheese,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.69</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
